text: Feeling subscription service lacks value and is not worth the cost compared to DIY alternatives

The pricing seems reasonable, but I need to make sure this app actually works before I invest time setting up my preferences - too many food apps have let me down with crashes.
These reviews mention good recommendations, but I want to see if the food photos actually look professional and appetizing - poor photography usually means poor curation overall.
This menu navigation feels clunky and I can't find the save function easily - if basic features are this hard to access, the app probably isn't reliable enough for regular use.
They want my location and camera access, but will my saved restaurants and photos actually sync properly? I've lost too much data from buggy food apps before.
Finally found an app with stunning food photography and accurate craft beer availability - this is exactly what I need for discovering authentic dining experiences worth sharing.
